_meta.purpose: Bundled yoga style taxonomy for the practice surface. Ships as JSON/TS constant; ids are stable and kebab-case per src/lib/activity.ts convention.

healthkit.mindfulSession: When mindfulnessEligible is true, the app MAY additionally offer writing an HKCategoryTypeIdentifier.mindfulSession sample for the session duration. Optional, user-controlled, descriptive — never auto-written without the user having enabled it.

notes: typicalIntensity is descriptive metadata for display/sorting only — never used to score or judge a session (constitution: descriptive, no gamification).
Kundalini includes substantial breathwork/meditation; it was left mindfulnessEligible=false per spec (yin/restorative only) but is the one style worth reconsidering — flagged as open question.

styles.label: Vinyasa
styles.descriptor: Breath-linked flowing sequences; pace and content vary class to class.

styles.label: Hatha
styles.descriptor: Slower-paced foundational practice; poses held individually with attention to breath.

styles.label: Yin
styles.descriptor: Long passive floor holds (3–5+ min) targeting deep connective tissue.

styles.label: Restorative
styles.descriptor: Fully supported resting poses with props; aimed at down-regulation, not stretch.

styles.label: Ashtanga
styles.descriptor: Fixed progressive series practiced in a set order at a vigorous, disciplined pace.

styles.label: Power
styles.descriptor: Fitness-oriented vinyasa derivative; strength-biased, faster, often gym-scheduled.

styles.label: Iyengar
styles.descriptor: Precision and alignment focus with props and long detailed holds.

styles.label: Kundalini
styles.descriptor: Kriya-based practice mixing repetitive movement, breathwork, chanting, and meditation.

styles.label: Hot
styles.descriptor: Any style practiced in a heated room (incl. Bikram-style 26+2); heat drives intensity up.

styles.label: Mobility / Stretch
styles.descriptor: Yoga-adjacent stretching or mobility flow without a formal lineage.
